name: CAS SA-6 Gauntlet

briefing.description:
Blue armor is pushing north across the FLOT toward the Inguri River. A Russian mechanized company (T-72Bs, BMP-2s, BRDM-2s) is dug in with infantry support. An SA-6 Kub site sits 2 km behind their line providing medium-range air cover. Red air has a 2-ship MiG-21 CAP orbiting between the target area and Sochi-Adler.

Your flight (Viper 1, 2x F-16C out of Batumi) provides Close Air Support. Threat environment: SA-6 Kub (medium-range, ~25 km), possible MANPADS near the infantry, and a MiG-21 CAP. The SA-6 is the most dangerous SAM but is forgiving relative to SA-10/SA-11 systems — stay low in the terrain or above 5000 m AGL to minimize exposure.

Dynamic slots: you choose your own loadout at rearming. Recommend LGBs for the T-72Bs, guns for BRDM-2s and trucks, and cluster or iron bombs for infantry concentrations.
briefing.blue_task:
1. Cold-start at Batumi; taxi and depart to the NW over the Black Sea.
2. Push inland at the IP; check in on 305.0 AM.
3. Orbit the target area at WP3. Locate and engage the SA-6 site first to sanitize the battlespace.
4. Provide CAS to the blue armor push: destroy red T-72Bs, BMP-2s, BRDM-2 scouts, truck convoy, and infantry positions.
5. Be alert for MiG-21 CAP out of Sochi — Magic will call bandits.
6. Egress south after Bingo fuel or winchester; RTB Batumi.
briefing.red_task: Defend the FLOT. SA-6 Kub provides air umbrella. MiG-21 CAP intercepts any blue aircraft pushing north of Batumi. Armored company holds the line against blue armor advance.

markers.name: SA-6 THREAT
markers.text: SA-6 Kub (Straight Flush) — 25 km range, medium-altitude SAM. Suppress before target runs.

markers.name: GROUND BATTLE
markers.text: FLOT: Blue armor (north) vs Red mechanized company (south). T-72Bs, BMP-2s, BRDM-2s, infantry — CAS requested.

actions.message: VIPERS: Blue armor is pushing north at the FLOT. Red mechanized company with SA-6 Kub cover. Sanitize the SAM first, then work the armor column. T-72Bs for your LGBs, BRDMs and trucks for guns, infantry at the tree line. Bandit 1 (MiG-21 CAP) is airborne out of Sochi — Magic will call. Check in on 305.0 AM.
MAGIC: Vipers, picture is building. SA-6 Straight Flush is radiating from the FLOT — stay low in the terrain or above angels 16. Recommend you sanitize the SAM before pushing on the armor.
MAGIC: Vipers, Magic. Bandit 1 is a 2-ship MiG-21 at angels 16, BRAA 060 / 35 nm. They are holding CAP south of the target. Be advised — they will press if you stray north of the IP.
MAGIC: Vipers, you are 40 minutes in. Check fuel state and weapons remaining. Egress to WP4 when winchester. RTB Batumi. Good hunting.

mission_goals.description: Destroy the SA-6 Kub site (Straight Flush radar + 2x launchers)
Destroy red IFVs and scouts (BMP-2s, BRDM-2s)

agent_notes: CAS SA-6 Gauntlet is a cooperative 2-player CAS mission for F-16C novices learning air-to-ground. Dynamic slots: both players are Client skill with no preset payload so they configure their own loadouts via DCS rearming. Target layering: SA-6 Kub site (Straight Flush + 2x TELs, 25 km threat — forgiving SAM) for the first priority, then T-72Bs (LGB targets), BMP-2s (mixed gun/LGB), BRDM-2s (gun targets), Ural-375 trucks (soft / gun runs), and infantry squads (area / carpet bombing). Red air is 2x MiG-21Bis CAP out of Sochi-Adler — a beatable opponent for AIM-9X self-defense. Blue M1-Abrams and M2-Bradleys push north to create the ground battle narrative. Four timed triggers provide situation awareness throughout the sortie. Estimated sortie duration: ~45 minutes.
